---
title: "Nasal Swab Cell Isolation for scRNA-seq Livestream"
description: "Ordovas-Montanes Lab, Boston Children's Hospital"
# date: "2024-10-15"
# categories: [Wet Lab]
image: "nsdi.png" 
format:
  html:
    includes:
      in_header: style.css
      before_body: cover.html
---

## Training Overview

<script type="text/javascript">
document.write(`
<!-- Background Image with Gradient Overlay and Slideshow -->
<div id="intro-section" style="position: relative; text-align: center; color: white;">

  <!-- Slideshow Background with the images -->
  <div class="slideshow-container">
    <!-- Use correct relative paths for the images with gradient overlay -->
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_0.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_1.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_2.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_3.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_4.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_5.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_6.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
    <div class="mySlides fade" style="background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom right, rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3), rgba(0, 128, 128, 0.3)), url('../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_7.png'); background-size: cover; background-position: center;"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Text Overlay on the Background Image -->
  <div style="position: absolute; bottom: 40px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); text-align: center; width: 100%;">
    <h1 style="font-size: 3em; font-weight: bold; text-align: center;">Nasal Swab Cell Isolation for scRNA-seq</h1>
    <p style="font-size: 1.5em; text-align: center; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
       This protocol provides step-by-step instructions to isolate cells from frozen nasopharyngeal swabs. A typical yield of 50,000 to 100,000 cells can be obtained per swab. This protocol was demonstrated live and followed up with library preparation and sequencing on NextSeq 2000.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Structured Program Details Below the Image -->
<div id="program-details" style="padding: 20px; background-color: #f9f9f9; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;">

  <h2 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Training Details</h2>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1.2em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    Single-cell sequencing and Analysis
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Introduction: Nasal Swab Cell Isolation</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    This protocol provides step-by-step instructions to isolate cells from frozen nasopharyngeal swabs. A typical yield of 50,000 to 100,000 cells can be obtained per swab. The protocol was demonstrated live and followed by library preparation and sequencing on the NextSeq 2000.
  </div>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <img src="../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_0.jpg" alt="Cell Isolation Protocol" style="width: 80%; margin-top: 10px;">
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Materials and Reagents</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    RPMI + 10 mM DTT<br>
    Accutase (3.5 mL per swab)<br>
    Quenching buffer: RPMI + 10% fetal bovine serum (FBS) + 4 mM EDTA<br>
    50 mL conical tubes, 15 mL conical tubes, 1.5 mL eppendorf tubes<br>
    Thermomixer set to 37°C, agitating at 300 rpm<br>
    Hemocytometer slides<br>
    Forceps, scissors, and sterile pipettes<br>
    Optional: 10X Genomics reagents for single-cell capture
  </div>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <img src="../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_1.png" alt="Materials and Reagents" style="width: 80%; margin-top: 10px;">
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Procedure Overview</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    Key steps include rapidly thawing the swab, cell dissociation with Accutase and RPMI, filtering cells through a 70 µm filter, and counting viable cells with trypan blue before downstream processing.
  </div>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <img src="../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_2.png" alt="Procedure Overview" style="width: 80%; margin-top: 10px;">
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Cell Counting and Preparation for scRNA-seq</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    After cell counting, proceed with library preparation for scRNA-seq. This involves using the 10X Genomics platform to capture individual cells and prepare them for sequencing.
  </div>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <img src="../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_3.png" alt="Cell Counting and Preparation" style="width: 80%; margin-top: 10px;">
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Post-Isolation Cell Processing</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    Proceed to cell staining or downstream applications such as single-cell RNA sequencing to assess the transcriptomic profile of the isolated cells.
  </div>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <img src="../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_4.png" alt="Post-Isolation Processing" style="width: 80%; margin-top: 10px;">
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Equipment Overview</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    Equipment includes a thermomixer, hemocytometer slides, and standard lab equipment such as forceps, scissors, and sterile pipettes.
  </div>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <img src="../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_5.png" alt="Equipment Overview" style="width: 80%; margin-top: 10px;">
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Results and Yield</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    The cell isolation process typically yields between 50,000 to 100,000 cells per swab. Results vary depending on sample quality and processing conditions.
  </div>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <img src="../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_6.png" alt="Results and Yield" style="width: 80%; margin-top: 10px;">
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Collaboration and Partners</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    This protocol was developed in collaboration with Boston Children's Hospital, MIT, and the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation to study respiratory diseases using cutting-edge single-cell RNA sequencing techniques.
  </div>
  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    <img src="../../files/img/training/Nasal_Swab_Cell_Isolation_for_scRNA_seq/NSP_7.png" alt="Collaboration and Partners" style="width: 80%; margin-top: 10px;">
  </p>

  <h3 style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;">Next Steps and Analysis</h3>
  <div style="text-align: center; font-size: 1em; max-width: 1000px; margin: 0 auto;">
    After cell isolation, proceed with single-cell RNA sequencing library preparation, followed by sequencing on the NextSeq 2000 platform. The computational analysis can be performed using tools like Seurat and Scanpy.
  </div>

</div>
`);
</script>

<!-- Add additional details if required -->
<style>
  #program-details {
    font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
    color: #333;
    line-height: 1.6;
    padding: 20px;
    background-color: #f9f9f9;
    max-width: 1200px;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }
  
  h2, h3 {
    margin-top: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-weight: bold;
    text-align: center;
  }

  div {
    font-size: 1em;
    margin: 0 auto;
    max-width: 1000px;
    text-align: center;
  }

  p {
    font-size: 1.2em;
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  /* Slideshow container */
  .slideshow-container {
    position: relative;
    height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  /* Each slide */
  .mySlides {
    position: absolute;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-size: cover;
    background-position: center;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 1.5s ease-in-out;
  }

  .mySlides:first-child {
    opacity: 1;
  }
</style>

<script>
  let slideIndex = 0;
  const slides = document.querySelectorAll('.mySlides');
  
  function showSlides() {
    slides.forEach((slide) => {
      slide.style.opacity = '0';  // Hide all slides
    });
    slideIndex++;
    if (slideIndex > slides.length) { slideIndex = 1; }  // Loop back to first slide
    slides[slideIndex - 1].style.opacity = '1';  // Show the current slide
    setTimeout(showSlides, 3000);  // Change image every 3 seconds
  }

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
    showSlides();  // Initialize the slideshow
  });
</script>
